input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.6.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must have separate containers (catch cans) to retain fluids from any vents from

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.6.1: The vehicle must have separate containers (catch cans) to retain fluids from any vents from
T.5.6.1 The vehicle must have separate containers (catch cans) to retain fluids from any vents from 
the powertrain systems.

final_answer: The vehicle must have separate containers (catch cans) to retain fluids from any vents from the powertrain systems.
